calendar.matters:
Petitioner Rosendo Lopez'S Petition To Vacate Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award, Part 1 Of 2
Off Calendar Jun-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Respondent Rosendo Lopez'S Petition To Vacate Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award is GRANTED. The January 30, 2017 arbitration award is vacated. CCP 1286.2(a)(5). (see word minutes for full details.) One order is signed for both motions. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/hk)

Respondent Rosendo Lopez'S Petition To Vacate Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award, Part 2 Of 2
Off Calendar Jun-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Respondent Rosendo Lopez'S Petition To Vacate Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award. Duplicate entry.

Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformance Therewith
Off Calendar Jun-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformance Therewith is DENIED in light of the ruling granting respondent Rosendo Lopez's petition to vacate attorney-client fee arbitration award. One order signed for both motions. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/hk)
